rationale: Updated the security.pentest.run output schema to include provider_cooldown as a valid status and to declare provider_profile, provider_lease, and provider_cooldown outputs.
Automated Codex review wrapper text with no independent requested code change.
Addressed the summarized materialization secret_refs gap and runtime-state filtering gap in the inline comment fixes.
Added secret_refs to PentestProviderMaterialization so launch-time secret descriptors are available alongside secret_env.
materialize_pentest_provider_profile now copies profile.secret_refs into the materialization result.
Added provider_runtime_state filtering for active cooldowns and slot availability to exact-ref and selector-based Pentest profile resolution, with activity-boundary coverage.
